title: Pressure regulating (PRV) station
requirement_text: Street pressure exceeds 80 psi — provide a PRV station: dual pilot-actuated regulating valves in parallel (consider a third small regulator for low-flow), with strainers.

citations.note: PRV when street pressure > 80 psi (dual pilot-actuated regulators, possibly a third small one); ≥25 psi required at the farthest/highest fixture.

title: LADWP Rule 16-D backflow compliance
requirement_text: Water purveyor is LADWP — backflow prevention at the service must comply with LADWP Rule 16-D (meter protection: RP assemblies; dual parallel branches for uninterrupted domestic service).

citations.note: LADWP Rule 16-D; meter protection RP assemblies, dual parallel branches for domestic.

title: All-electric water heating
requirement_text: Campus has no natural gas service — electric water heaters only (no gas, no heat-pump type): storage/tankless/instantaneous electric, ≤100 gal, high-recovery, in series with manifold; no multi-flue, no booster type. Gas subsystem rules are suppressed.

citations.note: Electric water heaters only (no gas, no heat pump); ≤100 gal, high-recovery, in series w/ manifold; no multi-flue; no booster type.
